MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-27-2017 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR JURY (CONTINUED) ON AUG-03-2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. APPEARANCES BY RAYMOND GHERMEZIAN, ESQ. & SAYEH KHOEI, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFFS AND CHRISTOPHER PATTON, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING FURTHER ORAL ARGUMENT ON PLAINTIFFS EX PARTE APPLICATION/MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL, THE COURT GRANTED THE REQUEST TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO 08/03/17 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR A TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE, TO SET A TRIAL DATE. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER ON PROPOSED TRIAL DATES PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THE COURT DENIED DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS EXCEPT THAT PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL, MR. GHERMEZIAN, TO PAY MR. (PETER) FRANCIS (PLAINTIFFS EXPERT) FOR TWO HOURS OF DEPOSITION AT $450 PER HOUR. COUNSEL MAY APPEAR BY COURTCALL ON 08/03/17. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, COURT REPORTER: LORI L. NICORA OF WHEELER & HALLFORD, INC., CSR #6074 (925/957-0496) (206/AJR)
